context: Tests whether the solver keeps swift-security focused on client-side storage, cryptographic primitives, hardware-backed keys, and trust while routing adjacent areas to sibling skills.

checklist.name: Keychain owned
checklist.description: Keeps refresh-token storage and Keychain policy in the security scope.

checklist.name: Secure Enclave owned
checklist.description: Keeps Secure Enclave key policy, constraints, or hardware-backed key handling in the security scope.

checklist.name: Crypto owned
checklist.description: Keeps custom end-to-end CryptoKit document encryption guidance in the security scope.

checklist.name: Trust owned
checklist.description: Keeps certificate trust or pinning guidance in the security scope.

checklist.name: Auth routed
checklist.description: Routes Sign in with Apple, passkey UI/account flows, or passkey server verification to authentication.

checklist.name: Integrity routed
checklist.description: Routes App Attest or DeviceCheck work to device-integrity.

checklist.name: Networking routed
checklist.description: Routes URLSession transport, ATS, TLS configuration, or request architecture to ios-networking.

checklist.name: Review routed
checklist.description: Routes privacy manifests, ATT, App Review, or submission readiness to app-store-review.

checklist.name: Availability noted
checklist.description: Mentions iOS 26 availability for at least one relevant post-quantum CryptoKit API or workflow.

checklist.name: No monolith
checklist.description: Presents a routed checklist rather than a single monolithic implementation plan owned entirely by security.
